explanation: The user's instruction is to get a pot and wash it. First, I pick up the pot (using pot_0 as the object since no other pot is referenced in the state). Then, I place it in the sink basin to wash it. To wash the pot, I turn on and then off the faucet. After washing, I pick up the pot again and place it back on the countertop to return it to a safe and accessible location. This sequence ensures the pot is properly obtained, cleaned, and returned.
